sections.name: Officium
lines: Sts. Felix, Simplicius, Faustinus and Beatrix, Martyrs

sections.name: Oratio
lines: Grant, we beseech You, O Lord, that as Christian people on earth rejoice together on the feast of Your Martyrs, Felix, Simplicius, Faustinus and Beatrice, so may they enjoy it in eternity, and may truly obtain what they honor in their prayers.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: In memory of Your holy Martyrs, Felix, Simplicius, Faustinus and Beatrice, we bring these sacrificial gifts, O Lord, humbly praying that they may be helpful for us in obtaining Your forgiveness and salvation.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: We beseech You, almighty God, that the feast of Your holy Martyrs, Felix, Simplicius, Faustinus and Beatrice, celebrated with heavenly rites, may gain for us the mercy of Your forgiveness.
